questions.question: List three examples of operating systems that use Unix-like system structures.
questions.hint: Consider the structure and design principles of Unix-like operating systems

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the monolithic structure in an operating system, and give an example of an operating system that uses this structure?
questions.hint: Explain the advantages and disadvantages of the monolithic structure

questions.question: Describe the advantages and disadvantages of the hybrid structure, and provide an example of an operating system that uses this structure.
questions.hint: Consider the trade-offs between monolithic and microkernel structures
